title: Renaissance Era Pack
description: This is an addon for Vic's Point Blank that adds high quality and realistic muskets and flintlocks to Minecraft!
body:
**The Renaissance Era Pack** is an content pack that adds some high-quality, realistic and accurate guns to Minecraft! The pack contains two great weapons to Minecraft with the aim of utmost realism, and an ammunition type for the gun.
- The first gun is the Musket. Crafted with two planks, two gold ingots and an iron ingot it is capable of dealing fifteen damage to your enemies at the cost of a Paper Cartridge. It takes a while to reload as muskets do, but while you are reloading, you can pull out the next gun!

![The Musket's Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c6c2d3f4d1bb3107ceb17cb467d1db23735c7e.png)
![The Musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb41e9b1ba44a0b4fc1f212ee200fef1ea4e8469.png)
- The next gun is a flintlock (not the pirate one). It deals eight damage and takes half the time to reload than the musket. You can't aim down the sights on this one to balance it, so it is better for close range. It is crafted with two oak planks, one gold ingot and one gold nugget.

![The Flintlock's Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d28933d6f9d18a7aa044a255f57d96bf8a61bba.png)
![The Flintlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcbd42532a29eebc34a0cc9ebb4bd25ae8bbcce3.png)
- The final addition to this content pack is the Paper Cartridge! This is used as ammunition for both guns. It is crafted with one paper and one gunpowder. 

![Paper Cartridge Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31f54c915e9d11744e6b66073a8d2b9fa637a7b0_0.webp)

**NOTE** - To install, locate the instance's folder and create a new folder inside of it. Call it "pointblank". Then drag and drop the content pack inside and you are ready to boot up the game.
Sorry that most recent version had issues, I didn't realise!
This is in beta, things may change!
